title: Comfortably Numb
why_this_song: Comfortably Numb by Pink Floyd (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: There is no pain, you are receding
A distant ship, smoke on the horizon
You are only coming through in waves
Your lips move, but I can't hear what you're saying

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "there" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "there" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hear" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hear" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: A distant ship, smoke on the horizon

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Just nod if you can hear me
This is not how I am
That'll keep you going through the show

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Comfortably Numb", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Comfortably Numb", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Comfortably Numb" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Comfortably Numb" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Comfortably Numb" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Comfortably Numb", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "Comfortably Numb" was released in 1979. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Comfortably Numb" foi lançada em 1979. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
